descriptionText: NEW Aventura 45 for Sale 2024 , Excellent Condition "AVAILABLE IMMEDIATELY" DON'T MISS THIS OPPORTUNITY WITH THE LATEST PRICE REDUCTION (NEW COLOUR AND HYDRAULIC PLATFORM INCLUDED IN THE PRICE)If you’re in the market for a spacious and well-equipped sailing yacht, the NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 might be just what you need. This particular model is an owner's version 3-cabin + skipper that is designed for both comfort and performance. She is new and is in excellent condition, making her a fantastic option for anyone looking to enjoy life on the water. The attention to detail and thoughtful amenities will ensure you have a delightful sailing experience.Key SpecificationsModel: Aventura 45Year: 2024Cabins: 4WC: 3Engine: 2x57 CV YanmarElectric Engine Control: Yes, at the post de barreGenerator: 5kW Fischer PandaConverter: Victron 12/220 V - 3 kWService Batteries: 3 x 330 Ah AGMDesalination System: 100 L/hSolar Panels: 2 x 100 W x 3 with a regulator on the rear roofUnderwater Lighting: 4 spotsEntertainment: 32' smart TV encastréNavigation Packages: Garmin N1 and Garmin N2Radar: Garmin radomeGalley Appliances: Microwave oven, dishwasher, washing machineComfort Features: 4 fans, cabin blinds for 1 cabinDescriptionThe NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 is designed to cater to families and groups who appreciate the joy of sailing together. The configuration includes four comfortable cabins, providing ample space for everyone on board. Each cabin offers privacy, making it ideal for both family sailing trips and gatherings with friends.Whether you are embarking on a weekend getaway or a longer journey, this catamaran's layout encourages social interaction. The spacious salon, featuring a polyester roof, offers a delightful spot to relax indoors while enjoying the stunning views through the large windows.The technical aspects of the yacht are equally impressive. With the 2x57 CV Yanmar engines, the Aventura 45 provides sufficient power for both cruising and maneuvering. The 5kW Fischer Panda generator ensures you have enough energy for all your electrical needs while at anchor. The desalination system will keep your water supply topped up, and the three service batteries provide plenty of power for all appliances, including the 32' smart TV and entertainment systems.For those who appreciate outdoor living, the solar panels on the rear roof help to keep the energy levels sustainable while adding to the feeling of independence at sea. The underwater lights are a nice touch for evening adventures, allowing you to explore the beauty of the underwater world.In summary, the NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 is a well-rounded yacht that balances comfort, technology, and functionality. With her ample living space, modern amenities, and thoughtful features, she is ready to take you on your next adventure at sea. Don't miss this opportunity to own a well-maintained vessel perfect for creating lasting memories on the water.
descriptionHtml:
NEW Aventura 45 for Sale 2024 , Excellent Condition "AVAILABLE IMMEDIATELY" 

DON'T MISS THIS OPPORTUNITY WITH THE LATEST PRICE REDUCTION (NEW COLOUR AND HYDRAULIC PLATFORM INCLUDED IN THE PRICE)

If you’re in the market for a spacious and well-equipped sailing yacht, the NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 might be just what you need. This particular model is an owner's version  3-cabin + skipper that is designed for both comfort and performance. She is new and is in excellent condition, making her a fantastic option for anyone looking to enjoy life on the water. The attention to detail and thoughtful amenities will ensure you have a delightful sailing experience.

Key Specifications

  • Model: Aventura 45
  • Year: 2024
  • Cabins: 4
  • WC: 3
  • Engine: 2x57 CV Yanmar
  • Electric Engine Control: Yes, at the post de barre
  • Generator: 5kW Fischer Panda
  • Converter: Victron 12/220 V - 3 kW
  • Service Batteries: 3 x 330 Ah AGM
  • Desalination System: 100 L/h
  • Solar Panels: 2 x 100 W x 3 with a regulator on the rear roof
  • Underwater Lighting: 4 spots
  • Entertainment: 32' smart TV encastré
  • Navigation Packages: Garmin N1 and Garmin N2
  • Radar: Garmin radome
  • Galley Appliances: Microwave oven, dishwasher, washing machine
  • Comfort Features: 4 fans, cabin blinds for 1 cabin

Description

The NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 is designed to cater to families and groups who appreciate the joy of sailing together. The configuration includes four comfortable cabins, providing ample space for everyone on board. Each cabin offers privacy, making it ideal for both family sailing trips and gatherings with friends.

Whether you are embarking on a weekend getaway or a longer journey, this catamaran's layout encourages social interaction. The spacious salon, featuring a polyester roof, offers a delightful spot to relax indoors while enjoying the stunning views through the large windows.

The technical aspects of the yacht are equally impressive. With the 2x57 CV Yanmar engines, the Aventura 45 provides sufficient power for both cruising and maneuvering. The 5kW Fischer Panda generator ensures you have enough energy for all your electrical needs while at anchor. The desalination system will keep your water supply topped up, and the three service batteries provide plenty of power for all appliances, including the 32' smart TV and entertainment systems.

For those who appreciate outdoor living, the solar panels on the rear roof help to keep the energy levels sustainable while adding to the feeling of independence at sea. The underwater lights are a nice touch for evening adventures, allowing you to explore the beauty of the underwater world.

In summary, the NEW Aventura 45 for sale 2024 is a well-rounded yacht that balances comfort, technology, and functionality. With her ample living space, modern amenities, and thoughtful features, she is ready to take you on your next adventure at sea. Don't miss this opportunity to own a well-maintained vessel perfect for creating lasting memories on the water.
